suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-11 False positive: CVE-2025-46392 applies to Apache Commons Loading Untrusted Configurations. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - spring-cloud-starter-netflix-hystrix:2.2.10.RELEASE Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-11 False positive: CVE-2025-67030 applies to Plex Utils. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - codehaus-plexus:plexus-utils:3.6.0 - utils_project:utils:3.6.0 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
